packs.name: Hugging Face CLI
packs.description: Protects against destructive Hugging Face CLI operations like delete-cache

structural_patterns.name: hf-delete-cache
structural_patterns.reason: huggingface-cli delete-cache removes downloaded models and datasets.
structural_patterns.explanation:
Deleting the cache removes local copies of models and datasets. This requires re-downloading them (often multi-GB files), which costs time and bandwidth.

Scan first to see what's in the cache:
  huggingface-cli scan-cache

packs.name: Weights & Biases (W&B)
packs.description: Protects against destructive W&B operations like sweep stop and artifact removal

structural_patterns.name: wandb-sweep-stop
structural_patterns.reason: wandb sweep --stop immediately terminates an active sweep.
structural_patterns.explanation: Stopping a sweep immediately halts all active agents associated with it. This can waste significant compute time and partial results may not be saved correctly.

structural_patterns.name: wandb-artifact-rm
structural_patterns.reason: wandb artifact rm removes a tracked artifact permanently.
structural_patterns.explanation:
Removing an artifact deletes the reference to the data. If this artifact is used in other experiments or reports, they will break.

List artifacts first:
  wandb artifact ls
